executive_summary: Business survived the full 2016-2025 window including the 2021-22 crisis. Net margin £1,461,253 (7.8% of revenue -- above 2-5% benchmark). Hedging cost £4,217,632 vs going naked (85% mandate price). 438 bill shock events (103 in crisis years); 10/11 retention offers accepted.
